prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T5 work setting, the evaluated element is B-401 Visual acceptance within 2.10 Assembly & Fabrication. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The field notes describe visible cues consistent with: visible cue-visible cue visible cue vs. drawing (DOC+ME). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors site visual standards, AIAG PPAP. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T5 B-401 Measurement & estimation
